title: podonosma orientalis
intro: Podonosma orientalis, also known as Himalayan Balsam, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it effective in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Podonosma orientalis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
